title: work-at Target Default
description: Fast generic target health profile for registered work-at surfaces.

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: If this target should exist, re-register it or restore worker connectivity, then rerun `work-at --health <target>`.

checks.title: Registered target path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the target path so the registered work surface exists on the worker.

checks.title: Registered target path is a git checkout
checks.repairHint: Restore the git checkout at the registered target path before continuing repo work.

checks.title: Registered repo has an origin remote
checks.repairHint: Restore the origin remote before using this worker surface for fetch, pull, or push work.

checks.title: Registered repo can read from origin
checks.repairHint: Repair remote Git auth on this worker so `git fetch` and `git ls-remote origin` succeed before continuing.

checks.title: Git is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Git on the worker or rerun worker setup before continuing repo work.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker or rerun worker setup before continuing JS tooling work.

checks.title: jq is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install jq on the worker so health scripts and structured CLI tooling can run cleanly.

checks.title: rg is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install ripgrep on the worker so agents can search quickly without falling back to slower tools.

checks.title: curl is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install curl on the worker so health probes and lightweight verification requests can run.

checks.title: apply_patch is available on target
checks.repairHint: Expose apply_patch on the worker so agents can make structured file edits there instead of inventing fragile shell workarounds.
repairCommand: wrapper_dir=/home/ec2-user/.local/bin; real_apply_patch=$(find /home/ec2-user/.nvm/versions/node -path '*/lib/node_modules/@openai/codex/node_modules/@openai/codex-linux-*/vendor/*/codex/codex' 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1); test -n "$real_apply_patch" && test -x "$real_apply_patch" && mkdir -p "$wrapper_dir" && ln -sfn "$real_apply_patch" "$wrapper_dir/apply_patch"

checks.title: Workspace root exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore the worker workspace root or rerun the worker bootstrap so the expected workspace exists.

checks.title: GitHub App auth config exists on target
checks.repairHint: Copy or provision `/home/ec2-user/.config/agent-github` on the worker, then rerun `work-at --health <target>` before any GitHub push or PR workflow.

checks.title: Runtime GitHub App helper exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore `/home/ec2-user/runtime/tools/github-app-token.sh` on the worker so GitHub App token flows work there.
